message:
fix(http2): prevent premature END_STREAM when flow control clamps send size (bd-2c9t)

The closure path response writer pre-computed an is_last flag based on
frame size, but after h2_fc_clamp_send reduced the actual send length,
the stale flag leaked through causing END_STREAM to be set on a non-final
DATA frame — truncating the response body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
